title: halimium halimifolium var. rhiphaeum
intro: Halimium halimifolium var. rhiphaeum, also known as rock rose, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Halimium halimifolium var. rhiphaeum is often used as a tea, infused oil, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
